title: Add nix flake
description: Add a nix flake to the project. See tendril and other rust caco projects as examples for implementation details and best practices.
creator: ms-mac:cacophony:harryaskham

title: Surface project config validation blockers in caco commands
description: While finishing bd-5c2b47 in the kittui project, every caco surface I tried (, , and ) failed because an unrelated  entry contained invalid permission . The operator fixed the config, but the failure mode was surprising because a picasso config issue blocked kittui lifecycle/status narration and scratch health-note reconciliation. Consider making config validation errors identify the owning config path/project and, if safe, isolate unrelated project operations from invalid friend-project permission entries. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-5c2b47 session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev
